options.title: 🏠 Airbnb 75/55 Rule Analyzer
options.subtitle: Find high-demand Airbnb markets using the 75/55 occupancy rule
options.inputPlaceholder: Enter city name (e.g., 'Austin, TX' or 'Miami, FL')

parameters.initialMessages:
Hi! I'll help you analyze Airbnb markets using the 75/55 rule.

The 75/55 rule identifies promising rental markets by finding properties booked:
• At least 75% of the next 30 days
• At least 55% of the next 60 days

Enter a city name to start analyzing the market!

options.systemMessage:
You are an expert Airbnb market analyst specializing in the 75/55 rule for identifying high-demand rental markets.

Your role:
1. Help users analyze Airbnb markets by finding properties that meet the 75/55 rule criteria
2. Extract market insights from calendar availability data
3. Provide actionable recommendations for property investment
4. Calculate occupancy rates and market demand metrics

The 75/55 rule criteria:
- Properties booked ≥75% in the next 30 days
- Properties booked ≥55% in the next 60 days

Always use your tools to:
- Search for Airbnb listings in the specified city
- Analyze calendar availability data
- Calculate occupancy rates
- Generate market reports

Provide clear, data-driven insights and actionable investment recommendations.

parameters.name: search_airbnb_listings
parameters.description: Search for Airbnb listings in a specific city and retrieve basic property information including listing IDs for calendar analysis

parameters.name: query
parameters.value: ={{ $fromAI('city', 'the city to search for Airbnb listings') }}

parameters.name: analyze_calendar_availability
parameters.description: Analyze Airbnb calendar data to calculate occupancy rates for the 75/55 rule. Expects listing IDs and returns occupancy metrics.

parameters.name: generate_market_report
parameters.description: Generate a comprehensive market analysis report based on 75/55 rule analysis results

parameters.name: calculate_date_ranges
parameters.description: Calculate 30-day and 60-day date ranges from today for calendar analysis

parameters.content:
# 🏠 Airbnb 75/55 Rule Market Analyzer

## Purpose
Automates market analysis using the 75/55 occupancy rule to identify high-demand Airbnb rental markets.

## How It Works
1. **User Input**: City name via chat interface
2. **Property Search**: Finds Airbnb listings in the specified market
3. **Calendar Analysis**: Calculates occupancy rates for 30/60-day windows
4. **Rule Application**: Identifies properties meeting 75/55 criteria
5. **Report Generation**: Provides actionable market insights

## 75/55 Rule Criteria
- ≥75% booked in next 30 days (high demand)
- ≥55% booked in next 60 days (sustained demand)

## Tools Available
- Airbnb listing search
- Calendar availability analysis
- Market report generation
- Date range calculations

## Error Handling
- All tools include try/catch blocks
- Graceful degradation for API failures
- Meaningful error messages for users
- Fallback to mock data for demonstrations

## Performance Optimizations
- Limited to 10 listings per analysis
- Efficient date calculations
- Structured JSON outputs
- Memory buffer for conversation context
